title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors

sources.title: EC2223KOB: Construction: Value of Business Done for Kind-of-Business for the U.S., Regions, and States: 2022
sources.what_it_supports: The frozen selected-archetype enumeration's HVAC kind-of-business numerator and the distinction between HVAC, plumbing, and mechanical contractor activities; it is not target-company financial evidence.

sources.title: 2022 SUSB Annual Datasets by Establishment Industry
sources.what_it_supports: Independent Census business-size dataset context for the frozen 100-499 employee-band denominator used to bridge the all-size kind-of-business share; it does not observe HVAC operating identity.

sources.title: Heating, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration Mechanics and Installers: Occupational Outlook Handbook
sources.what_it_supports: Federal occupational context confirming that HVAC mechanics and installers are a distinct occupation; it is not evidence for the frozen role weights, a target payroll, or removability.

narrative.executive_view: This packet is restricted to the frozen HVAC-focused contractor archetype within NAICS 238220, not the whole NAICS code. The supplied count ranges overlap the plumbing alternative, so selection uncertainty remains and target-specific economics are not inferred from aggregate industry material.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No selected-archetype financial statements, revenue-recognition policy, contract ledger, or documentable pass-through schedule was supplied. Recognized revenue and controllable value added therefore remain missing; gross billed revenue, equipment purchases, and subcontract cost cannot be silently used as substitutes.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen value basis preserves six source-free HVAC role classes and their cash-cost weights. It requires bounded assumption-labelled cash-cost and removability judgments, but no target payroll, contractor ledger, or cash-burden reconciliation was available to establish a target-specific removable-cost numerator.
narrative.implementation: No target system logs, workflow baselines, implementation records, vendor invoices, or before-and-after operating cases were available. Operational realization and implementation investment are consequently unresolved rather than being filled from generic software or labor-market claims.
narrative.commercial_capture: No customer contracts, maintenance-agreement cohorts, bid tabs, renewal data, or matched price histories for the selected archetype were available. Commercial retention is kept separate from operations and is missing rather than assumed from industry competition or technology adoption.
narrative.buyability: No closed transaction census, broker-engagement record, ownership record, buyer process log, or bidder history was provided for the selected archetype and size band. Sale availability, conditional buyer access/win, and the two five-year capacity constraints are separately unresolved.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No all-in entry EV/normalized-EBITDA comparables or state-matched historical exit evidence was provided. A normalized year-five state, entry multiple, and downside exit anchor cannot be constructed without importing unsupported sponsor, operating, or market assumptions.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive baseline service ledger with constant-quality units, revenue, pass-through, and year-five operator-controlled quantities was supplied. The required fixed-base Laspeyres controllable-value-added basket is therefore marked missing rather than represented by a scalar demand forecast.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The primary risks are selection uncertainty, lack of target financial and operating evidence, and absence of a closed service-basket reconciliation. Census and BLS materials provide classification context only; they do not convert an industry archetype into evidence for a particular contractor.

scenario_narratives.low: Low is not a quantified downside case because target revenue, cash costs, realization, commercial retention, buyability, pricing, and survival evidence are unavailable. The only bounded source-free cash-cost judgments remain explicitly unproven assumptions.
scenario_narratives.base: Base preserves the frozen HVAC-focused archetype and its source-free role structure but does not infer a target operating case. All forward primitives requiring target records remain missing, so no base economic conclusion is authored.
scenario_narratives.high: High is not a favorable extrapolation from industry context. Without target-specific documents and a reconciled service basket, no upper operating, commercial, transaction, valuation, or survival result is defensibly specified.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No selected-archetype trailing-twelve-month accrual financial statements or revenue-recognition evidence was supplied.
caveats: Industry receipts are not a target's recognized revenue.

evidence.rationale: No target revenue presentation or eligible third-party pass-through documentation was supplied.
caveats: No cost is deducted without target-specific documentation.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Annual controllable employee cash-cost sizing assumption in dollars; not a target payroll observation and not scored while recognized revenue is missing.

amount.rationale: The frozen assumption-mode value basis requires a bounded source-free employee-cash-cost primitive. This broad sizing assumption is not claimed to be payroll for any identified contractor.
caveats: No target payroll register, burden schedule, or revenue reconciliation was available.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Annual controllable labor-contractor cash-cost sizing assumption in dollars, excluding any deductible third-party pass-through; not a target ledger observation.

amount.rationale: The frozen assumption-mode value basis requires a bounded source-free controllable-contractor cash-cost primitive. The band is only a disclosed modeling judgment, not an observation of subcontract spend.
caveats: No contractor ledger or control-and-performance documentation was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen core HVAC field role; it measures avoidable cash cost at full implementation, not task time.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen field-support trades role, stated independently of any target payroll evidence.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for frozen field supervision and project management, not an observed headcount reduction.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for the frozen sales, estimating, and account-management role, excluding commercial price response.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for frozen dispatch and administrative roles, not an observed automation outcome.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free removable-cash-cost judgment for frozen executive and corporate leadership roles, excluding sponsor transformation or synergy.
caveats: No target workflow or staffing evidence was available.

r1.rationale: No target implementation evidence supports year-one operational realization.

r2.rationale: No target implementation evidence supports year-two operational realization.

r3.rationale: No target implementation evidence supports year-three operational realization.

r4.rationale: No target implementation evidence supports year-four operational realization.

r5.rationale: No target implementation evidence supports year-five operational realization.

k0.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports up-front implementation cost.

k1.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports year-one investment.

k2.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports year-two investment.

k3.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports year-three investment.

k4.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports year-four investment.

k5.rationale: No target change-investment evidence supports year-five investment.

c1.rationale: No target contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence supports year-one commercial retention.

c2.rationale: No target contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence supports year-two commercial retention.

c3.rationale: No target contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence supports year-three commercial retention.

c4.rationale: No target contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence supports year-four commercial retention.

c5.rationale: No target contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence supports year-five commercial retention.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: The immutable selected-archetype specification bridges the Census 2022 HVAC kind-of-business share to the frozen 1,152-firm 100-499 employee band: 471/1,152 at base, with the frozen 353/1,152 to 589/1,152 endpoints. It is not a direct count by operating identity.
caveats: The bridge uses all-size revenue shares rather than direct firm counts by operating identity.
Selection uncertainty remains because the HVAC and plumbing ranges overlap.

bridge.population: 2022 Census construction kind-of-business activity for the United States
bridge.unit: estimated share of frozen 100-499 employee firm band
bridge.business_model: HVAC-focused installation and service contractor within NAICS 238220

validation_support.rationale: SUSB is a distinct Census business-size dataset that independently provides the firm-size context for the frozen denominator, though it does not measure operating identity.

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No closed transaction census, ownership record, or broker engagement evidence supports five-year sale availability.
caveats: Unknown owner age is not availability evidence.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No source-and-process evidence supports the reference buyer's conditional access, diligence, and win share at market-clearing price.
caveats: This channel is distinct from price and is not inferred from sale availability.

deal_execution_capacity_5y.rationale: No reference-buyer staffing, financing, diligence, or closing record supports a five-year deal-execution capacity.

integration_onboarding_capacity_5y.rationale: No accountable implementation staffing, onboarding record, or operational capacity evidence supports a five-year integration capacity.

buy_multiple.rationale: No closed, all-in entry EV/normalized-EBITDA comparables for the selected archetype and size band were supplied.
caveats: Asking-price or broad-market commentary is not substituted for closed all-in pricing.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No evidence establishes an entry-equivalent normalized year-five state without importing sponsor transformation or operating changes.

anchor.rationale: No entry-equivalent comparable-multiple anchor is supportable without the missing normalized state and closed transaction evidence.

operator_controlled_value_added_demand_s.rationale: No exhaustive target baseline service ledger reconciled to recognized revenue and documented pass-through was available, so no fixed-base basket can be supported.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: All narrative and primitive references are limited to the frozen HVAC-focused installation and service contractor archetype, not NAICS 238220 generally.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through item is authored or deducted because no target documentation was supplied; employee and contractor cash-cost IDs are distinct from the empty pass-through partition.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removable-fraction assumptions address only avoidable cash cost at full implementation and do not include pricing, commercial response, deal activity, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is not folded into cash-cost removability or commercial retention; it is missing pending target investment records.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is separately missing pending contracts, price books, renewals, and bid evidence; it is not implied by operational roles or implementation.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Buyer access and win are separately missing and are not estimated from entry price, sale availability, or any price concession.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The missing downside anchor binds the same null state digest as the missing normalized state and retains the required entry-equivalent comparable-multiple channel.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed downside exclusion map excludes commercial retention, constant-price survival, implementation, operating value, buyability, and all prohibited transformation channels.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The survival construct retains the required fixed-base CVA assertions but has no services because a reconciled baseline basket and year-five operator-controlled quantities were not supplied.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Target recognized revenue and documented third-party pass-through
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing: no selected-archetype financial statements, contracts, or ledger reconciliation.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents a bounded controllable-value-added denominator and therefore prevents V and survival support.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Operational realization, investment, and commercial retention schedules
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing for every year because no target workflow, implementation, contract, renewal, bid, or price evidence was supplied.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents I, C, and the h cross-check from being determined.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Sale availability, access/win, capacities, and transaction multiples
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing: no closed deal-flow, buyer-process, capacity, or all-in comparable evidence was supplied.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents B and P from being determined.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing: no exhaustive baseline service ledger and year-five quantities reconcile to the revenue/pass-through boundary.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents constant-price survival from being determined.

reviewer_note: Fresh official Census and BLS sources were reopened for classification and business-size context. They are not used to convert aggregate industry information into target-specific revenue, payroll, workflow, commercial, transaction, valuation, or survival evidence. The frozen assumption-mode value basis is preserved with source-free bounded cash-cost and removability judgments; all other unavailable primitives remain MISSING.
